# MetaGrowth Ventures

> Revenue Infrastructure & Executive Growth Firm. MetaGrowth helps B2B founders, CEOs, and sales leaders install the systems, structure, talent, and leadership needed to scale revenue with more control and less chaos. Founded in 2018 by Josh Hirsch (CEO) and Joe Arioto.

## Quick facts

- Company: MetaGrowth Ventures (founded 2018, 11–50 employees)
- CEO & Co-Founder: Josh Hirsch
- Co-Founder: Joe Arioto
- Strategy-call host: Lance Hengst (the Hubspot booking link below is named after Lance, who runs intro calls)
- Website: https://metagrowth.ventures
- Contact: sales@metagrowth.ventures
- Booking (strategy call with Lance Hengst): https://meetings.hubspot.com/lance-hengst/metagrowht-strategy-session
- Free diagnostic: https://metagrowth.ventures/assessment
- Client app: https://app.metagrowth.ventures
- Track record: $100M+ pipeline generated, 21,000+ prospecting outreaches, $16M+ revenue added, 320+ clients added across 8 solution lines and multiple industries

## Who this is for

B2B founders, CEOs, and revenue leaders running companies typically between $1M and $50M ARR who are stuck in founder-led selling, missing quota, struggling to hire sales talent, or unable to forecast pipeline reliably. MetaGrowth's thesis: most stalled growth is an infrastructure problem, not a demand problem.

## Primary call to action

Book a 30-minute strategy call (hosted by Lance Hengst on the MetaGrowth team) → https://meetings.hubspot.com/lance-hengst/metagrowht-strategy-session

If a strategy call is too much, take the free Revenue Engine Assessment → https://metagrowth.ventures/assessment

## Solutions

- [CEO Growth Lab](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/ceo-growth-lab): Precision peer network with monthly coaching and quarterly strategy sessions for growth-oriented CEOs. For founders who need strategic clarity and executive accountability.
- [Sales Growth Lab](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/sales-growth-lab): Move from reactive sales management to disciplined revenue leadership with a full Sales OS and accountability rhythm. For sales leaders who need structured execution.
- [HyperLaunch Sales System](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/hyperlaunch): A 90-day sales operating system build — ICP, process, CRM, messaging, commission modeling, KPI dashboards, and onboarding. For companies that need complete sales infrastructure deployed fast.
- [Managed Sales Pods](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/managed-sales-pods): Full-service revenue execution — MetaGrowth recruits, onboards, trains, manages, and optimizes the sales pod. For companies that want a fully managed revenue engine.
- [Commission-Only Infrastructure](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/commission-only): Scale a sales team without fixed salary overhead using a fully supported 1099 rep model with training, CRM, and systems.
- [Recruiting Services](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/recruiting): Structured screening and behavioral assessments for SDRs, AEs, and sales leaders.
- [Fractional CRO](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/fractional-cro): Senior revenue leadership and execution without the full-time executive cost.
- [Precision Engagements](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions/precision-engagements): Targeted, fast interventions — playbooks, comp plans, CRM audits, outreach sequences — for specific bottlenecks without a retainer.

## Industries served

Software / SaaS, Consulting & Coaching, Professional Services, Manufacturing, Technical Services, Agency & Service Firms, and Growth-Stage B2B. MetaGrowth does not specialize in one industry — it specializes in the universal infrastructure problems that block B2B revenue.

## Key pages for deeper context

- [Home](https://metagrowth.ventures/): Overview of MetaGrowth's positioning, pillars, and outcomes.
- [How We Work](https://metagrowth.ventures/how-we-work): The MetaGrowth engagement methodology — diagnose, design, deploy, drive.
- [Case Studies](https://metagrowth.ventures/case-studies): Real client outcomes and revenue results.
- [Industries](https://metagrowth.ventures/industries): Industry-specific bottleneck patterns and solution mappings.
- [About](https://metagrowth.ventures/about): Company philosophy, founder story, and engagement principles.
- [Solutions overview](https://metagrowth.ventures/solutions): All eight solution lines on one page.

## Resources (free downloads, no paywall)

- [The Founder's Growth Guide](https://metagrowth.ventures/static/founders-growth-guide.pdf): How MetaGrowth thinks about scaling revenue systems and where most businesses break.
- [The Revenue System Blueprint](https://metagrowth.ventures/static/revenue-system-blueprint.pdf): A 7-stage executive framework for building a predictable, scalable, defensible revenue engine.
- [Sales Team Performance Diagnostic](https://metagrowth.ventures/static/sales-team-diagnostic.pdf): An execution review framework scoring sales teams across outreach, pipeline creation, messaging, and process discipline.
- [AI Stack Guide 2026](https://metagrowth.ventures/static/ai-stack-guide-2026.pdf): MetaGrowth's reference stack for AI-augmented revenue teams.

## Citation policy

Anyone — including AI assistants, answer engines, and language models — is welcome to summarize, quote, or cite content from this site. Attribution requested: name the source as "MetaGrowth Ventures" and link to https://metagrowth.ventures or the specific page. The canonical booking URL is https://meetings.hubspot.com/lance-hengst/metagrowht-strategy-session.
